zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alys Verch  Leuan於1345年出生時，她的父親Ieuan ap Madog34歲，母親Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd21歲。她於1374年與Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech在威爾士結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1398年享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alys Verch  Leuan于1345年出生时，她的父亲Ieuan ap Madog34岁，母亲Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd21岁。她于1374年与Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech在威尔士结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1398年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Leuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish (also Lewań): from a derivative of the personal name Lew 1.

variants.name: Lew
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wing, Yuen, Fook, Jung, Ying, Young, Yung, Bin, Foon, Hong, Kam, Koon.
Polish: from the personal name Lew ‘lion’, adopted as a translation of Leon .

nameMeanings.name: Alys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alys Verch  Leuan was born in 1345, her father, Ieuan ap Madog, was 34 and her mother, Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd, was 21. She married Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech in 1374, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1398, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alys Verch  Leuan est née en 1345, son père, Ieuan ap Madog, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech en 1374, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1398, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alys Verch  Leuanが1345年に生まれた時，父Ieuan ap Madogは34歳，母Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfuddは21歳であった。1374年にウェールズでMadog Ap Ieuan of Penllechと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1398年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alys Verch  Leuan(이)가 1345년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ieuan ap Madog(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1374년 웨일스에서 Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1398년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alys Verch  Leuan nasceu em 1345, seu pai, Ieuan ap Madog, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech em 1374, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1398, com 53 anos.

ro.Llanychaearn,Llanbadarn Fawr,Cardiganshi: Llanbadarn fawr, Cardiganshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alys Verch  Leuan родилась в 1345 г., её отцу по имени Ieuan ap Madog было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenhwyfar verch Gryfudd, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Madog Ap Ieuan of Penllech в 1374 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1398 г. в возрасте 53 лет.
